scripts.typecheck:maker: npm run build -w @vn-maker/engine-core && npm run build -w @vn-maker/project-store && npm run build -w @vn-maker/use-cases && npm run build -w @vn-maker/generation-codex && npm run typecheck -w @vn-maker/cli && npm run typecheck -w @vn-maker/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run legacy:typecheck && npm run typecheck:maker
scripts.test:maker: npm run build:maker && node tests/vn-maker-domain.test.mjs && node tests/vn-maker-use-cases.test.mjs && node tests/vn-maker-beta.test.mjs && node tests/vn-maker-regression.test.mjs
scripts.build:legacy: npm run legacy:typecheck && npm run legacy:build:engine && npm run build:html
scripts.build:maker: npm run build -w @vn-maker/engine-core && npm run build -w @vn-maker/project-store && npm run build -w @vn-maker/use-cases && npm run build -w @vn-maker/generation-codex && npm run build -w @vn-maker/cli && npm run build -w @vn-maker/web
scripts.build: npm run build:legacy && npm run build:maker
